title: Update hero image to AI illustration of Odisha state map with solar elements

requirements.text: Generate a new AI illustration hero image depicting the state map of Odisha overlaid with solar power elements (solar panels, sun rays, energy grid lines, warm amber/orange glow), suitable for use as a full-screen hero background. Save as 'hero-odisha-solar-map.dim_1920x1080.png' in frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: Modify the hero image to ai illustration image of state odisha map with solar

acceptanceCriteria: The image clearly depicts the recognizable outline/map of Odisha state
Solar power elements (panels, sun rays, energy lines) are visually prominent in the illustration
The image uses warm amber/orange/gold tones consistent with the app's solar theme

requirements.text: Update the Hero component (frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx) to replace the existing hero background illustration with the newly generated Odisha solar map image ('hero-odisha-solar-map.dim_1920x1080.png'). Ensure the image is displayed as a full-screen background with appropriate overlay to keep headline and CTA text readable.

quotes: Modify the hero image to ai illustration image of state odisha map with solar

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays the new Odisha solar map illustration as its background
A semi-transparent overlay is applied so headline, tagline, and CTA buttons remain clearly legible
The image covers the full viewport width and height (object-cover or equivalent)
All existing hero content (headline, tagline, WhatsApp CTA, trust-stat cards) remains intact and visible

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Preserve all existing hero section content and functionality (text, CTA buttons, trust-stat cards)
nonGoals: Changing hero section text or translations
Redesigning layout or structure of the Hero component beyond the background image swap

edits: Replace the hero background with an AI illustration of the Odisha state map silhouette filled with solar panel patterns, glowing sun rays radiating outward, and energy grid lines overlaid on the map, using warm amber, orange, and gold tones against a deep navy sky background (hero-odisha-solar.dim_1920x1080.png > hero-odisha-solar-map.dim_1920x1080.png)
